nasb.text: Now these are the records of the generations of Shem, Ham, and Japheth, the sons of Noah; and sons were born to them after the flood.

esv.text: These are the generations of the sons of Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth. Sons were born to them after the flood.

cnv.text: 以下是挪亞的兒子閃、含、雅弗的後代。洪水以後，他們都生了兒子。

ccb.text: 洪水以后，挪亚的儿子闪、含和雅弗都生养了儿女，以下是他们的后代。

csbs.text: 以下是挪亚的儿子闪、含、雅弗的谱系： 洪水之后，他们都生了儿子。
